label: Xero
description: Connect to Xero to read and write transactions, contacts, and financial data from your accounting ledger.

form.title: Connect Xero
form.subtitle: Authorize Anton to access your Xero organisation's accounting data via OAuth 2.0.

methods.label: Sign in with Xero (OAuth 2.0)
methods.description: Opens Xero's consent screen in your browser. You'll need to create a free OAuth 2.0 app in the Xero Developer Portal first — takes about 3 minutes. Tokens are stored locally and refreshed automatically.
methods.how_to:
## Sign in with Xero (OAuth 2.0 — bring your own client)

Xero requires you to register an app to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret. This is free and takes about 3 minutes.

### 1. Create a Xero OAuth app

1. Go to [Xero Developer Portal](https://developer.xero.com/app/manage) and sign in with your Xero account.
2. Click **New app**.
3. Fill in:
   - **App name**: e.g. `Anton`
   - **Company or application URL**: your company website or `https://localhost`
   - **OAuth 2.0 redirect URI**: `http://127.0.0.1` (Anton uses a local redirect)
4. Click **Create app**.

### 2. Copy your credentials

1. Inside the new app, open the **Configuration** tab.
2. Copy the **Client ID** — paste it into the field below.
3. Click **Generate a secret**, copy the **Client secret** immediately (it won't be shown again), and paste it into the field below.

### 3. Authorize

1. Click **Submit**. Anton opens Xero's consent screen in your browser.
2. Select the Xero organisation(s) you want to grant access to.
3. Review the requested scopes:
   - **accounting.transactions** — read/write invoices, bills, bank transactions
   - **accounting.contacts** — read/write customers and suppliers
   - **offline_access** — issue a refresh token so Anton can reconnect without asking again
4. Click **Allow access**. Anton stores the tokens locally and refreshes them automatically.

### Notes

- If your Xero plan is **Starter**, some transaction types may be rate-limited by Xero's API.
- To revoke access: Xero → **My Xero → Connected apps** → find Anton → **Disconnect**.
- Xero refresh tokens expire after 60 days of inactivity — simply re-authorize if Anton reports an auth error.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: Found on the Configuration tab of your app in the Xero Developer Portal.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client secret
fields.description: Generated once in the Xero Developer Portal. Copy it immediately — it cannot be retrieved after leaving the page.
